title: [Moore][MooreToCore] Add support for queue comparisons: equality/inequality
body:
This PR adds support for comparing two queues for equality and inequality.
In Moore, this has been implemented using `UArrayCmpPredicateAttr` for the comparison predicate, since queues are just resizable unpacked arrays. (and thus support the same comparisons).

A new Moore op `QueueCmpOp` has been created, and lowering has been added to a new Sim op `QueueCmpOp`. (An alternative lowering might generate a loop over the members, but I think an explicit op that lowers into a call to the simulator will be most efficient).

For now, we have a custom `QueueCmpPredicateAttr` in Sim, but when we support lowering unpacked array comparisons, we should probably rename this attribute (and change where it lives), then reuse it for both queues and unpacked arrays as is in the case in Moore.
